chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1689 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 18.11.2016. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel. -.-.-. None present for the petitioners and same was the position on last date of hearing when a detailed favourable order was passed. Today, learned State Counsel has filed parawise comments on behalf of official respondents in which it has been confirmed that no FIR till date has been lodged against the petitioners nor any harassment was caused to them. This petition is disposed of with the directions that official respondents will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners, if they are approached with such a request, whereas, private respondents are restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioners. Copy of this order be provided to learned State Counsel for compliance. JUDGE
